\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage[most]{tcolorbox}

\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
\setlength{\parskip}{2pt}
\setlength{\emergencystretch}{4em}
\raggedbottom
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
\cfoot{\color{gray}\footnotesize\thepage}

\setlist[itemize]{leftmargin=1.2em,itemsep=1pt,topsep=2pt,parsep=0pt,partopsep=0pt}
\setlist[enumerate]{leftmargin=1.25em,itemsep=1pt,topsep=2pt,parsep=0pt,partopsep=0pt}

\titleformat{\section}
  {\normalfont\sffamily\bfseries\large}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}

\titleformat{\subsection}
  {\normalfont\sffamily\bfseries\normalsize}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}

\titleformat{\subsubsection}[runin]
  {\normalfont\sffamily\bfseries\small}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}
  [.]

\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{7pt}{3pt}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{5pt}{2pt}
\titlespacing*{\subsubsection}{0pt}{3pt}{0.5em}

\makeatletter
\renewcommand{\maketitle}{}
\makeatother

\newcommand{\formheaderrule}{%
  \par\vspace{1mm}%
  \noindent\color{gray!65}\rule{\linewidth}{0.4pt}%
  \par\vspace{2mm}%
}

\newtcolorbox{aiwaadminbox}{
  colback=gray!8,
  colframe=gray!45,
  boxrule=0.4pt,
  arc=1mm,
  left=2mm,
  right=2mm,
  top=1.5mm,
  bottom=1.5mm,
  before skip=3mm,
  after skip=0mm,
  title=For AIWA Use Only,
  fonttitle=\bfseries\footnotesize,
  coltitle=black
}
